case_title: UNITED PARCEL SERVICE VS OZIER, PETERSE, AND ASSOC.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED PARCEL SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OZIER, PETERSE, AND ASSOC. $126.74 PRINCIPAL, $17.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $144.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CERT. RECEIPT TO OZIER, PETERS & ASSOC. RETURNED SIGNED.
